## What

<!-- Brief description of the change. -->

## Why

<!-- Context, motivation, or linked issue. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new functionality (minor bump)
- [ ] fix — bug fix (patch bump)
- [ ] refactor — code restructure without behavior change (no bump)
- [ ] chore — infrastructure, deps, or other maintenance (no bump)
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] ci — CI / workflow change
- [ ] breaking change — incompatible API change (major bump after 1.0.0)

## Checklist

- [ ] Commit message follows Conventional Commits
- [ ] CI passes
- [ ] README updated if the public API changed
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or PII in diff
